items.title: NORTHROP ASSY - SURFACE CLEANING AND PREP (ACS-PRS-2101 )
items.instruction:
NOTE: OJT AS-09NGC-3 IS REQUIRED TO COMPLETE THIS TASK</h>

ALL SURFACES INCLUDING FASTENERS TO BE SEALED SHALL BE CLEAN, DRY AND FREE FROM DUST, CHIPS, OIL, GREASE AND OTHER FOREIGN MATERIALS, WHICH WILL REDUCE SEALANT ADHESION, PRIOR TO PROMOTER AND SEALANT APPLICATION.
ORGANIC COATINGS MORE THAN 24 HOURS OLD SHALL BE ABRADED WITH FINE OR VERY FINE GRIT NYLON ABRASIVE PADS TO PROVIDE A MATTE FINISH PER ACS-PRS-2101. USING THE FOLLOWING: 

•	ALUMINUM OXIDE ABRASIVE SHEET, 180-GRIT OR FINE (COMMERCIALLY AVAILABLE)
•	CLEANING AND FINISHING PADS TYPE A OR FINER (3M SCOTCH BRITE ST. PAUL. MN)

items.title: NORTHROP ASSY - ADHESION PROMOTER (ACS-PRS-2101)
items.instruction:
NOTE: OJT AS-09NGC-3 IS REQUIRED TO COMPLETE THIS TASK</h>

ALL SURFACES TO BE SEALED SHALL BE CLEANED BY SOLVENT WIPING IMMEDIATELY PRIOR TO ADHESION PROMOTER AND/OR SEALANT PER ACS-PRS-2101. USING THE FOLLOWING:

•	MAT CAT: 800-1680 (SOLVENT)
•	MAT CAT: 800-1574 (WIPES)

SOLVENT RICS/LOT:_________________________________________________________________

WIPES RICS/LOT:___________________________________________________________________

ADHESION PROMOTER:

PRIOR TO THE APPLICATION OF SEALANT, ALL SURFACES TO BE SEALED AND MATING SURFACES SHALL BE COATED WITH THE APPLICABLE ADHESION PROMOTER PER ACS-PRS-2101 AS FOLLOWS:

•	MAT CAT: 800-1945 (ADHESION PROMOTER)

SEALANT APPLICATION SHALL BEGIN WITHIN TWO HOURS AFTER PROMOTER HAS DRIED FOR SURFACES LEFT UNPROTECTED. SURFACES THAT ARE PROTECTED (e.g. WRAPPED IN KRAFT PAPER AFTER PROMOTER HAS DRIED) SHALL HAVE THE SEALANT APPLICATION STARTED WITHIN 24 HOURS. IF THE PROMOTED SURFACE BECOMES CONTAMINATED, THE PROMOTER SHALL BE REMOVED BY SOLVENT WIPING AND THE SURFACE RE-PREP'D AND RE-PROMOTED AS LISTED ABOVE.

•	DATE AND TIME OF APPLICATION:__________________________________________

•	ADHESION PROMOTER RICS/LOT:___________________________________________

•	ADHESION PROMOTER EXPIRATION DATE:_________________________________

•	ADHESION PROMOTER DRYING TIME/DATE START:________________________

•	ADHESION PROMOTER DRYING TIME/DATE STOP:_________________________

APPLY A THIN, UNIFORM COAT OF PROMOTER TO THE SURFACE USING A CLEAN WIPE CLOTH, CLEAN BRUSH, OR A CLEAN ADHESION DISPENSING APPLICATOR. DO NOT ALLOW THE PROMOTER TO PUDDLE.  ONLY A THIN COAT OF PROMOTER IS REQUIRED.  ALLOW PROMOTER TO DRY FOR 15 MINUTES AT AMBIENT TEMPERATURE, DO NOT WIPE DRY.  DO NOT TOUCH SURFACE WITH BARE HANDS NOR ALLOW CONTACT WITH OBVIOUS CONTAMINANTS.

FILLET SEAL PER ACS-PRS-2101, TYPE III USING THE FOLLOWING:

•	MAT CAT: 800-1881 (TYPE II, CLASS B SEALANT)

EXTRUDE A BEAD OF SEALANT ALONG THE EDGE OF THE JOINT, HOLDING THE SEALANT GUN NEARLY PERPENDICULAR TO THE DIRECTION OF TRAVEL. 
FORCE THE SEALANT INTO THE EDGE BY MAINTAINING A BEAD OF SEALANT AHEAD OF THE TIP OF THE GUN.  WORK OUT ANY ENTRAPPED AIR USING A FILLET TOOL/SPATULA.

IF SUFFICIENT SEALANT SQUEEZE OUT ON FAY SEALED CLIPS, BRACKETS, AND MISCELLANEOUS STRUCTURE THE SQUEEZE OUT MAY BE USED TO FORM FILLET.

NOTE: OJT AS-09NGC-2 IS REQUIRED TO COMPLETE THIS TASK</h> 

INSTALL HARDWARE PER ACS-PRS-6012 AND ELECTRICAL BOND PER ACS-PRS-4002, CLASS R

SURFACE PREPARATION AND CLEANING:

ALL SURFACES TO BE BONDED SHALL BE CLEAN, DRY AND FREE FROM DUST, CHIPS, OIL, GREASE AND OTHER FOREIGN MATERIALS. ELECTRICAL BONDING MUST BE COMPLETED WITHIN 4 HOURS AFTER CLEANING

CONTACT ENGINEERING IF EB AREA COATING IS DAMAGED

REMOVE MASKING AND CLEAN EB AREA USING ISOPROPYL ALCOHOL.

•      MAT CAT   800-1774 (ISOPROPYL ALCOHOL)

HARDWARE INSTALLATION/ELECTRICAL BONDING:

INSTALL BOLTS, SCREWS, NUTS, AND WASHERS PER ACS-PRS-6012 (TORQUE MUST BE APPLIED ON THE NUT SIDE ONLY)

RESISTANCE TESTING:

TEST INSTALLED HARDWARE TO ENSURE PART TO HARDWARE RESISTANCE DOES NOT EXCEED .0025 OHMS. PARTS MUST BE TESTED AGAIN AFTER 15 MINUTES TO VERIFY VALUES HAVE NOT CHANGED.

items.title: NORTHROP ASSY - ELECTRICAL BOND PART TO PART (ALUMINUM)(ACS-PRS-4002 INSTALL BOLTS PER ACS-PRS-6012)(TORQUE NUT SIDE ONLY)
items.instruction:
NOTE: <h>OJT AS-09NGC-2 IS REQUIRED TO COMPLETE THIS TASK</h>

ELECTRICAL BOND PER ACS-PRS-4002, CLASS R AND INSTALL FASTENERS PER ACS-PRS-6007

SURFACE PREPARATION AND CLEANING:
ENSURE EB AREA WAS CONVERSION COATED IN ACCORDANCE WITH MIL-DTL-5541, CLASS 3. (SEE ENGINEERING IF NOT)

ALL SURFACES TO BE BONDED SHALL BE CLEAN, DRY AND FREE FROM DUST, CHIPS, OIL, GREASE AND OTHER FOREIGN MATERIALS. ELECTRICAL BONDING MUST BE COMPLETED WITHIN 4 HOURS AFTER CLEANING

CONTACT ENGINEERING IF EB AREA COATING IS DAMAGED

REMOVE MASKING AND CLEAN EB AREA USING ISOPROPYL ALCOHOL.

•       MATCAT: 800-1774 (ISOPROPYL ALCOHOL)

FASTENER INSTALLATION/ELECTRICAL BONDING:
NOTE: <h>OJT AS-09NGC-3 IS REQUIRED TO COMPLETE THIS TASK</h>

WET INSTALL FASTENERS WITH SEALANT PER ACS-PRS-2101 AS FOLLOWS:

•	MAT CAT: 800-1881 (TYPE II, CLASS B SEALANT)

SEALANT SHALL BE APPLIED ONLY TO THE CONICAL AREA OF THE FASTENER HEAD OR COUNTERSINK AREA AFTER INSTALLING THE FASTENER IN THE HOLE. SEALANT SHALL NOT BE APPLIED TO THE FASTENER THREADS. EVIDENCE OF SEALANT SQUEEZE OUT SHALL BE VISIBLE COMPLETELY AROUND THE FASTENER HEAD WHEN FULLY SEATED. REMOVE EXCESS SEALANT IMMEDIATELY AFTER INSTALLATION WITH A CLEAN WIPE CLOTH. 

NOTE: <h>OJT AS-00 IS REQUIRED TO COMPLETE THIS TASK</h>

INSTALL HI-LOK/HI-TIGUE/HI-LITE FASTENERS PER ACS-PRS-6007

RESISTANCE TESTING:
TEST INSTALLED HARDWARE/PART TO ENSURE SURFACE TO SURFACE RESISTANCE DOES NOT EXCEED .0025 OHMS. PARTS MUST BE TESTED AGAIN AFTER 15 MINUTES TO VERIFY VALUES HAVE NOT CHANGED. 

•       USE AEMC 6240 MICRO-OHMETER FOR TESTING (APPROVED PER RCI 101704)

PERFORM BRUSH COAT/FILLET SEAL IN ACCORDANCE WITH ACS-PRS-2101 ON HEAD SIDE ONLY USING THE FOLLOWING:

items.title: NORTHROP ASSY - CLICK BOND (ACS-PRS-2051)
items.instruction:
NOTE: OJT AS-02C IS REQUIRED TO COMPLETE THIS TASK</h>

INSTALL BONDED NUTPLATES PER ACS-PRS-2051, TYPE II

<h>SURFACE PREPARATION AND CLEANING:</h>

ALL SURFACES TO BE BONDED SHALL BE CLEAN, DRY AND FREE FROM DUST, CHIPS, OIL, GREASE AND OTHER FOREIGN MATERIALS. 

PROTECT SURROUNDING AREAS FROM DAMAGE DURING SANDING

NOTE: ONCE SANDING HAS STARTED OPERATORS HAVE (1) HOUR MAX TIME TO PASS WATER BREAK TEST.

PRIMER AND SULFURIC ACID ANODIZED COATING ON ALL METALLIC SURFACES TO BE ADHESIVE BONDED SHALL BE COMPLETELY REMOVED AND SANDED TO BARE METAL.  

WHEN SANDING, A FRESH ABRASIVE SHEET MUST BE USED FOR EACH DIRECTION. THE ABRASIVE PAPER MUST BE MOVED BACK AND FORTH IN THE SAME DIRECTION (SIDE TO SIDE OR UP AND DOWN) WITHOUT CIRCULAR MOTION. 

IMPRESSIONS FROM THE ABRADING SHALL BE VERY EVIDENT. WHEN ABRASION STREAKS IN ONE DIRECTION BECOME EVIDENT MOVE TO ABRADING THE SURFACE WITH A FRESH ABRASIVE SHEET IN THE PERPENDICULAR DIRECTION. 

ABRADE ALL METALLIC SURFACES INCLUDING HARDWARE UNTIL A BRIGHT UNIFORM SURFACE IS EXPOSED. THE ABRADED SURFACE SHALL EXTEND .250" BEYOND THE BONDED HARDWARE FOOTPRINT.

ENSURE THAT HARDWARE IS ALSO ABRADED UNTIL A BRIGHT UNIFORM SURFACE IS EXPOSED. DO NOT USE CIRCULAR MOTION WHEN ABRADING HARDWARE ONLY GO SIDE TO SIDE  AND USE FRESH PAPER WHEN CHANGING DIRECTION.

•	ALUMINUM OXIDE ABRASIVE SHEET, 120- GRIT TO 240-GRIT OR FINE (COMMERCIALLY AVAILABLE)
•	ABRASIVE PADS, SCOTCH-BRITE 7447 VERY FINE GRADE (3M SCOTCH BRITE ST. PAUL. MN) 


ALL SURFACES TO BE BONDED SHALL BE CLEANED WITH SCOURING POWDER AND DIONIZED WATER ON A VERY FINE SCOTCH BRITE PAD (RED PAD). 

ONCE SURFACE HAS BEEN CLEANED SPRAY A MIST OF DIONIZED WATER AND CHECK FOR WATER BREAKS. 

IF WATER BREAK TEST IS NOT PASSED REPEAT SANDING AND CLEANING (NOTE AFTER (3) FAILED ATTEMPTS AT WATER BREAK TEST CONTACT ENGINEERING AND STOP WORK ON PARTS)

AFTER WATER BREAK TEST IS PASSED WIPE WITH DRY WIPER UNTIL NO RESIDUE IS SEEN

•	MATCAT: 800-1574 (WIPES)
•	MATCAT: 800-1951 (DIONIZED WATER)
•	MATCAT: 800-1952 (SCOURING POWDER)
•	MATCAT: 800-1954 (AC-130)

(TIME FROM START OF SANDING AND FINISH OF CLEANING MUST BE WITHIN ONE HOUR)

<h>AC-130 TREATMENT:</h>

MIX AC-130 IF NOT ALREADY MIXED 

ONCE MIXED AC-130 HAS A (30) MIN INDUCTION TIME BEFORE IT CAN BE USED AND A (10) HOUR POT LIFE

TIME AC-130 MIXED:___________________________

APPLY AC-130 TO SURFACES TO BE BONDED AND ENSURE SURFACE REMAINS COATED WITH AC-130 FOR (2) MIN

RICS/LOT: ______________________________

DATE OF MANUFACTURE: __________ DATE OF EXPIRATION: ____________

APPLY AC-130 A TOTAL OF (5) TIMES THEN ALLOW TO DRY FOR (60) MIN. BONDING MUST TAKE PLACE WITHIN (4) HOURS OF DRYING

TIME OF 2ND COAT OF AC-130:___________________
TIME OF 3RD COAT OF AC-130:___________________
TIME OF 4TH COAT OF AC-130:___________________
TIME OF 5TH COAT OF AC-130:___________________

<h>NUTPLATE INSTALLATION:</h>

APPLY THE MIXED ADHESIVE AS TWO LINEAR BEADS ALONG THE LONG AXIS OF THE NUTPLATE BASEPLATE.

A THIN TO MODERATE LAYER OF ADHESIVE YEILDS BEST RESULTS.

ONE BEAD SHALL PASS AROUND EACH SIDE OF THE ELASTOMERIC INSTALLATION FIXTURE, AND THE AMOUNT OF MATERIAL IN THE BEADS SHALL BE CONTROLLED TO GIVE A SMALL AND UNIFORM AMOUNT OF MATERIAL SQUEEZE OUT WHEN THE NUTPLATE IS PULLED INTO POSITION.

THE ELASTOMERIC INSTALLATION FIXTURE MAY BE REMOVED AS SOON AS THE ADHESIVE CURES.

<h>THE CURE TIME FOR TYPE II ADHESIVE IS APPROXIMATELY 24 HOURS AT 75 DEGREES</h>

<h>PUSH-OFF LOAD TESTING:</h>

NOTE: QUALITY ASSURANCE MUST BE PRESENT FOR TESTING  

PERFORM PROOF LOAD PUSH-OFF TEST ON EVERY INSTALLED NUTPLATE AFTER ADHESIVE BOND HAS CURED AND PRIOR TO SEALING. MINIMUM PUSH OFF FORCE SHALL BE IN ACCORDANCE WITH ACS-PRS-2051 TABLE V.
